title: Franklin Resources (BEN) Up 9.1% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: Franklin Resources (BEN) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: High Costs & Low Investment Management Fee Ail Franklin (BEN)
text: Franklin's (BEN) rising operating costs on investments in technology are concerning. Volatile investment management fees and a strict regulatory environment are other headwinds.

title: 7 Dividend Stocks to Avoid in Your Retirement Portfolio
text: Amid soaring inflation, interest rates have also surged. Fixed income options such as certificates of deposit are paying the highest interest rates that they've offered in more than a decade.

title: Franklin's (BEN) October AUM Declines 2.9% on Weaker Markets
text: Franklin (BEN) reports a preliminary AUM of $1.33 trillion for October 2023, which reflects a 2.9% sequential fall.

title: Franklin Resources, Inc. Announces Month-End Assets Under Management
text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Franklin Resources, Inc. (Franklin Templeton) (NYSE: BEN) today reported preliminary month-end assets under management (AUM) of $1.33 trillion at October 31, 2023, compared to $1.37 trillion at September 30, 2023. This month's decrease in AUM reflected the impact of negative markets and long-term net outflows. By Asset Class: (In USD billions) Preliminary 31-Oct-23 30-Sep-23 30-Jun-23 31-Mar-23 31-Oct-22 Fixed Income $468.9 $483.1 $505.1 $510.1 $477.9 Equity.

title: 3 Stocks to Watch as SEC Window for Approval Opens
text: BlackRock (BLK), Invesco (IVZ) and Franklin (BEN) are three asset managers that are eagerly awaiting SEC's nod for their Bitcoin ETF applications as the approval window opens.

title: 4 Dividend Aristocrats Signal Buys In November As 6 Await
text: "Dividend Aristocrats in the S&P 500 Index… have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years. "-- Kiplinger.com/Investing. 66 Aristocrats, screened as of November 6, 2023, represented all eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker estimated-top-ten net-gains ranged 22.29%-34.44% topped-by O & WBA.

title: The 7 Highest Yielding Dividend Aristocrats You Can Buy and Hold Forever
text: 2022 was a dreadful year for investors with the S&P 500 down almost 20% and the Nasdaq lower by a stunning 33%, and what a difference a year can make.
